title: ToLCNDV-Spain is not transmitted by Trialeurodes vaporariorum and is inefficiently transmitted by Bemisia tabaci MED between zucchini and the wild cucurbit Ecballium elaterium
description: This study evaluates the vector efficiency of whiteflies in transmitting the Mediterranean 'Spain strain' of Tomato leaf curl New Delhi virus between cultivated zucchini and the wild cucurbit Ecballium elaterium. It demonstrates that greenhouse whitefly Trialeurodes vaporariorum does not transmit the virus and Bemisia tabaci MED transmits it only poorly, suggesting limited epidemiological relevance of the wild host.
